title: ModernHDV
description: A modern GUI-based Auction House plugin for Minecraft servers, built for performance, usability and scalable multi-server networks. This is the Free edition of ModernHDV.
body:
# ⭐ ModernHDV — The Next-Generation Marketplace System for Minecraft Servers

![ModernHDV Hero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fbb8c230e5bb5efb6bc7154655751b8f5ebbddd.gif)

**ModernHDV is a modern, performance-focused, production-ready auction house system designed for Minecraft servers that care about long-term stability, scalability and player experience.**

Unlike traditional auction house plugins, ModernHDV focuses on **network-scale economy management and resilient transaction handling**, making it suitable for both single-server setups and growing multi-server infrastructures.

Built with real production environments in mind, ModernHDV reduces **item loss risks, payout inconsistencies and operational overhead** thanks to its crash-safe and recovery-aware architecture.

🟢 Free Edition available  
⭐ ModernHDV Pro unlocks advanced network-scale capabilities  

🔗 More info: https://mcminelab.fr/plugins/modernhdv/  
🚀 ModernHDV Pro: https://mcminelab.fr/plugins/modernhdv/pro

✔ Fully GUI-driven experience
✔ No complex player commands required
✔ Crash-safe and recovery-aware
✔ SQLite ready out of the box
✔ MySQL & Multi-Server infrastructure (Pro)
✔ Supports Minecraft versions 1.14 → 26.1

---

## ModernHDV Editions

**Free Edition includes**:

- Full GUI Auction House
- SQLite storage
- Crash-safe transactions
- Category browsing & search
- Personal auction management
- Multi-language support

**ModernHDV Pro adds**:

- MySQL storage
- Multi-Server marketplace synchronization
- Automatic Free → Pro migration
- Automatic SQLite ↔ MySQL storage transfer
- In-game admin GUI configuration
- Live configuration reload
- Last auction relist tools
- Advanced selling workflow tools
- Designed for scalable server networks

ModernHDV Free is ideal for single-server environments.
ModernHDV Pro is built for serious multi-server infrastructures.

**Discover full Pro capabilities:**
https://mcminelab.fr/plugins/modernhdv/pro

---

## 🌐 Built for Scalable Server Networks (Pro)

ModernHDV introduces a network-ready marketplace architecture designed for growing Minecraft server ecosystems.

• Shared auction house across multiple servers  
• Safe cross-server payout routing  
• Player presence tracking system  
• Reduced desynchronization risks  
• Built for long-term scalability  

This makes ModernHDV especially suitable for **serious server networks and large communities.**

---

## 🧭 Player Experience

![Player UX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6ae985372743885e65cb25939ddc2661bdbd3aa.gif)

ModernHDV enables players to interact with the auction house entirely through intuitive graphical interfaces.

• Fully GUI-driven auction house  
• Category-based browsing  
• Integrated item search  
• Secure purchase confirmations  
• Personal auction management  
• Pagination & price sorting  
• Multi-language support  
• Smart Search V1  

Trading becomes a **natural gameplay mechanic rather than a technical system.**

---

## ⚙️ Designed for Server Teams

ModernHDV balances **out-of-the-box usability with deep customization potential.**

• YAML-based configuration  
• Configurable GUI items & categories  
• Automatic YAML / language migration  
• Built-in update checker  
• In-game administrative interfaces (Pro)  
• Live configuration reload (Pro)

---

## 💾 Reliability & Infrastructure

ModernHDV includes an auction pipeline designed with real server stability constraints in mind.

• Crash-safe transaction handling  
• Startup reconciliation system  
• Atomic purchase operations  
• Reduced payout desynchronization risks  
• Safer SQLite & MySQL processing  
• Automatic storage transfer between SQLite and MySQL (Pro)  
• Automatic Free → Pro upgrade flow for main plugin files (Pro)  

---

## 🚀 Free vs Pro Philosophy

The free edition provides a **complete, production-ready auction house experience.**

ModernHDV Pro focuses on:

• Network-scale infrastructure  
• Advanced administrative tooling  
• Improved operational workflows  
• Enhanced configuration flexibility  
• Safer upgrade and migration workflows  

It is designed for **servers with long-term growth ambitions.**

---

## 🎮 Commands


```
/hdv | /ah — Open the Auction House — modernhdv.use
/hdv | /ah reload — Reload configuration (Pro) — modernhdv.admin
/hdv | /ah config — Open admin interface (Pro) — modernhdv.admin
```


---

## 🔌 Compatibility

• Java 8+  
• Minecraft 1.14+  
• Vault  
• Any economy plugin  

---

## 📚 Documentation & Support

Documentation: https://mcminelab.fr/documentation/modernhdv  
Website: https://mcminelab.fr  

ModernHDV is developed by **MCMinelab**, a studio specialized in scalable Minecraft server systems.
